standard.label: AlloFlow 5383 source, blueprint, feedback, learning, source-parity, key-integrity, encoding, and editorial QA v2
standard.limitation: Not ETS approval; independent learning-disabilities educator, structured-literacy, mathematics-intervention, accessibility, family, legal, cultural-linguistic, and psychometric validation remain pending.

expansion.method: The assistant reviewed structure and answer derivation across all activities and conducted a cross-domain qualitative sample. Normalized answer-set, rationale, and reference reuse was counted as one source content kernel. The 300 transformations are approved as guided practice only, not as independent exam items.

contentBinding.meaning: Credential-specific native and learning-library QA passed against exactly these 200 source items and this learning-library artifact; final expansion activities are reviewed separately by the consolidated release QA.
